ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Primary position of the player */,
  "dk_proj" REAL /* Projected points on DraftKings */,
  "pts_proj" REAL /* Projected points in the game */,
  "reb_proj" REAL /* Projected rebounds in the game */,
  "ast_proj" REAL /* Projected assists in the game */,
  "mse_dk" REAL /* Mean Squared Error for DraftKings projection */,
  "mse_pts" REAL /* Mean Squared Error for points projection */,
  "mse_reb" REAL /* Mean Squared Error for rebounds projection */,
  "mse_ast" REAL /* Mean Squared Error for assists projection */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Salary of the player */,
  "eligible" INTEGER /* Eligibility status of the player (True/False) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of professional experience */,
  "college" TEXT /* College attended by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_position FOREIGN KEY ("position") REFERENCES positions ("position_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position (e.g., PG, SG, SF, PF, C) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  "team_status" TEXT /* Status of the team (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the league */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the league */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the league (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "league_type" TEXT /* Type of the league (e.g., head-to-head, season-long) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_compositions" (
  "team_composition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team composition entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player in the team */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date the player was acquired by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_composition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_compositions_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_compositions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Field goals made */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Field goals attempted */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Three-pointers made */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Three-pointers attempted */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Free throws made */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Free throws attempted */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "team_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team statistic entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Field goals made */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Field goals attempted */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Three-pointers made */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Three-pointers attempted */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Free throws made */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Free throws attempted */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "league_standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties */,
  "points_for" INTEGER /* Total points scored */,
  "points_against" INTEGER /* Total points allowed */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Current rank in the league */,
  "winning_percentage" REAL /* Winning percentage of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_league_standings_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_league_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Metric the ranking is based on (e.g., points, rebounds, assists) */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the player in the metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the player in the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_rankings_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Metric the ranking is based on (e.g., points, rebounds, assists) */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team in the metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the team in the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_rankings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "preference_name" TEXT /* Name of the preference */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date of the injury */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the injury (e.g., active, recovered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., add, drop, trade) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team involved in the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transactions_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transactions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
